name: Beef'n Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound salt pork or bacon, diced
1 pound chuck steak (up to 2 lbs), cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans in cold water for at least 8 hours, or overnight.
2. In a large pot, bring the beans to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until tender (about 1-1/4 to 1-1/2 hours).
3. Drain the beans well. Reserve some of the cooking liquid if desired.
4. In a skillet over medium heat, brown the salt pork and chuck steak cubes until no longer pink.
5. Transfer the browned meat and beans to a slow cooker.
6. Add garlic, tomato paste, reserved bean liquid, chili powder, cumin, and salt.
7. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
8. Cook on High for 2 hours, then switch to Low and cook for an additional 7 to 12 hours, or cook the entire meal on High for 5 to 8 hours until everything is tender.
Serves 8
